title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Elon Musk admits millions of Tesla owners need upgrades for true ‘Full Self-Driving’
summary: The admission could open Tesla to legal challenges after it spent years promising customers they were just one software update away from owning fully autonomous cars.

title: OpenAI Launches Workspace Agents Feature in ChatGPT
summary: Codex-powered tools automate reports, code, Slack replies, and other workplace tasks.

title: AngelList's USVC Gives Investors Exposure to OpenAI, Anthropic and xAI—Starting at $500
summary: AngelList's new USVC fund allows non-accredited retail investors to gain exposure to major private firms like Anthropic and OpenAI.

title: How SpaceX preempted a $2B fundraise with a $60B buyout offer
summary: Cursor was on track to close a $2 billion funding round this week but chose to halt discussions after SpaceX offered a $10 billion "collaboration fee" and a path to a $60 billion acquisition.

title: Justin Sun Alleges Trump's World Liberty Threatened to Burn His WLFI Tokens
summary: An investment in President Trump's meme coin allegedly upset members of World Liberty Financial’s team, the lawsuit claims.

title: OpenAI Just Open-Sourced a Tool That Scrubs Your Secrets Before ChatGPT Ever Sees Them
summary: OpenAI has released a small, free model that strips names, addresses, passwords, and account numbers out of any text, right on your laptop, before you paste it into an AI chatbot.

title: SpaceX Warns Investors Elon Musk’s Space-Based AI Data Centers May Not Pay Off
summary: SpaceX’s IPO filing says orbital AI computing remains unproven and commercially uncertain despite Musk’s public push for space as AI’s next frontier.

title: 'Axie Infinity' Gaming Network Ronin Sets Date for Ethereum Layer-2 Migration
summary: The Ronin gaming network will slash RON token inflation from over 20% to less than 1% while introducing automated developer rewards.

title: Robinhood Ventures Invests $75 Million in OpenAI, Offering Retail Traders Exposure
summary: Robinhood’s publicly-traded fund aims to give retail investors exposure to AI startups like OpenAI, without accreditation requirements.
